name: Nina Scarlet Rose

sheet.name: Nina Scarlet Rose
sheet.background_story:
Nina Scarlet Rose is the Battle Captain of the Berserker Furies. 

Although not much is currently known about her yet, there is a rumor that she rarely takes off the Detritus Helm because her strikingly beautiful facial features contrast her savagery and disregard for the life of other beings that are not the Turlo people.

It is said she was one of the only Furies who survived the stand against Yorn & Yogg
